description: An electric utility bill from a regulated distribution company showing account header fields, supply and delivery charge totals, meter usage in kWh, peak demand in kW, and an itemized delivery charge breakdown.

accountNumber.description: The account number printed in the bill header, kept exactly as shown including any dashes.

meterNumber.description: The meter number printed in the header and meter-reading row, kept exactly as shown.

serviceAddress.description: The single-line service address the bill is rendered to, joined as street then city state zip.

dueDate.description: The payment due date printed in the amount-due header box, in YYYY-MM-DD format.

billingPeriodStart.description: The start date of the billing period from the meter-reading dates, in YYYY-MM-DD format.

billingPeriodEnd.description: The end date of the billing period from the meter-reading dates, in YYYY-MM-DD format.

daysBilled.description: The number of days billed printed in the meter-reading section.

totalAmountDue.description: The total amount due printed in the header amount-due box and account summary, as a number.

totalSupplyCharges.description: The total supply charges printed in the billing summary, as a number.

totalDeliveryCharges.description: The total delivery charges printed in the billing summary and at the end of the delivery details, as a number.

totalKwhDelivered.description: The total kWh delivered for the billing period printed in the meter-reading section, as a number without separators.

peakDemandKw.description: The current-year peak demand in kW printed in the usage summary demand panel, as a number.

charges.description: each delivery/distribution charge line amount. include every charge line (positive charges and negative credits); exclude any total/summary row. the amounts sum to total delivery charges.

amount.description: The dollar amount for this charge line as a number without a currency symbol, negative for credits.
